drill_quality.note: weekly review grades 2-3 real drill entries crisp/fuzzy/blank

items.title: Numbers & money — floating point, bigint seams, rounding & allocation
Time — daily-cutoff boundaries, wall vs monotonic clocks, timezone seams
Text & Unicode — normalization, graphemes, locale-aware name matching
Postgres transactions — isolation levels, lost updates, write skew, indexes
Node runtime — event loop order, backpressure, streams, V8 memory
HTTP & networking — timeouts, retries, idempotency, pools, TLS vs HMAC
Security primitives — HMAC, timing-safe compare, replay windows, JWT limits
Containers & Linux — namespaces/cgroups, PID 1, OOM kill, layers
Redis — stampede, lock TTL + fencing tokens, single-thread blocking
Git & TypeScript — object model, type-system runtime boundary
LLM mechanics — tokens, sampling, hallucination, KV cache, lost-in-the-middle
Context & agent loop — prompt caching, tool calling, MCP, context economics
Retrieval & memory — embeddings, chunking, hybrid search, staleness
Evals & statistics — significance, base rates, Goodhart, judge biases, p99
Queueing & performance — Little's Law, utilization curve, coordinated omission
AI security mechanics — injection, lethal trifecta, capability isolation
Cloud IAM & IMDS blast radius — SSRF→creds, IMDSv2, scoped roles
Secrets & data protection — envelope encryption, KMS, rotation, tokenization
Observability economics — wide events vs metrics, cardinality, post-hoc queries
Contracts & compatibility — Hyrum's Law, schema evolution, consumer contracts, ACL
Concurrency models — actors/CSP/structured concurrency, cancellation trees
Type-driven design — ADTs, exhaustiveness, parse-don't-validate, typestate
Working Backwards — the PR/FAQ discipline (book + template)
On Writing Well — clarity as subtraction (Parts I–II)
ADR format — Nygard template, adr.github.io, design-doc guides
Read Anthropic's agent essays as writing — how constraints are stated
State invariants precisely — safety vs liveness, one-sentence checkable invariants (Lamport vocabulary)
Rewrite the spec for {{your next nontrivial feature}} as a PR/FAQ; cold-test it on the agent
Backfill 3 ADRs for {{three load-bearing architecture decisions you never wrote down}}
Daily drill ×42: Intent / Constraints / Done means / Not doing
Meta: rewrite the prompt that set up this curriculum's agent as a spec
Restate-first drill ×2 weeks: agent restates intent/assumptions/plan before acting on any nontrivial request; grade divergence matched/partial/diverged

Blast-radius calibration: classify 10 agent asks by reversibility → size the spec to match; for one unreviewable diff, name the 3 must-check lines first (money/auth/external calls) — reuse the m6-d7 lens
Rule-file audit: for every line of your agent rule files (AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/rules), name the incident that earned it; delete or rewrite the rest; red-team the file for ambiguity like a fintech spec
Ship one epic spec-first with < 3 clarification round-trips
fast-check — property-based testing fundamentals
StrykerJS — mutation testing
Modern Treasury — Accounting for Developers I–III + How to Scale a Ledger
Hamel Husain — Your AI Product Needs Evals + LLM-as-judge guide
Eugene Yan — task-specific evals + product evals
Write {{your system}}'s invariants file (one page, versioned, in agent contexts)
Property-test {{your most intricate calculation path}}: monotonicity, conservation, idempotency
Run mutation testing on {{your highest-stakes money/data path}}; triage surviving mutants
Turn {{an ad-hoc test harness you already have}} into a scored eval with CI regression gate
Deterministic simulation testing — the FoundationDB/TigerBeetle method
Architectural fitness functions in CI (e.g. dependency-cruiser) — block agent-introduced boundary violations
Spike: seed-replayable deterministic simulation of {{one race condition in your highest-stakes flow}}
Repro-first habit ×2 weeks: no agent bugfix claim accepted without the failing repro shown before the fix, passing after; journal every claim that couldn't produce one
{{your key codebases}} gate merges on invariants/properties/evals + 1 caught-bug story
DDIA 2nd ed. ch. 6–7 — replication & sharding, read against your own platform
DDIA 2nd ed. ch. 8–10 — transactions, distributed faults, consistency & consensus
Jepsen analyses — PostgreSQL + Kafka reports
Google SRE book ch. 3–4 — SLOs and error budgets
Durable-workflow internals (e.g. Temporal) — determinism, at-least-once activities, idempotency
Stretch: learntla.com / Practical TLA+
Write 'Failure semantics of {{your highest-stakes money/data path}}' — death at every hop
Game day: kill a worker mid-{{your most critical multi-step transaction}} in staging, with the team
Write the SLO doc for {{your most depended-on service}} (availability + correctness + error budget)
Model {{your most critical state machine}}; verify illegal transitions blocked
DDIA 2nd ed. ch. 11–12 — derived data, the dual-write problem, outbox/CDC
Audit one DB→downstream path for dual-writes; design the outbox/CDC fix
Write the expand-contract runbook for the next live migration of {{your highest-stakes table}}
'How our platform actually fails' doc adopted as onboarding material
Anthropic canon: effective agents, context engineering, tools, Agent SDK
Simon Willison — lethal trifecta + prompt injection series
OWASP Top 10 for LLM applications
Threat-model {{your agent platform}}: attack tree + injection red-team vs staging
Least-privilege audit of every agent tool; default-deny with written grants
Build the delegation economics table across 5 task classes; publish policy
Regression evals for {{an agent feature that contacts users or moves their data}}; 'never act on the wrong user' hard gate
Authorization architecture — BOLA/IDOR, ReBAC (Zanzibar), policy engines, OWASP API Top 10
Tenant-scoping audit across {{your multi-tenant services}}; evaluate centralized authz enforcement
Supply-chain pass: dependency-confusion check on {{your internal packages}}, provenance gate, CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md poisoning audit
Webhook receiver audit: raw-bytes HMAC, constant-time compare, replay window + idempotency across {{your inbound webhook endpoints}}
Seam-map one live epic into 3–5 independently verifiable slices (each with its own entry/exit check); run 2 on parallel agents; document where the seams leaked
Design + run one fan-out→judge→gate pipeline on a task class from the m4-d3 table; measure whether the verification-gate cost beat the parallel speedup
Auditor-ready security review of the agent platform
Publish '{{a hard-won production lesson from your agent platform}}'
The Mom Test — truth extraction from stakeholders
Continuous Discovery Habits + north-star metric design
Compute {{your product}}'s unit economics (cost per {{unit of customer value}})
One-page business case for the next vertical, incl. kill-evidence
Define north-star + guardrail metrics for {{your product}} and {{your agent platform}}
Attend 3 business/ops meetings; define every term you couldn't
One build/don't-build decision changed by your written case
The Staff Engineer's Path (Reilly) + Staff Engineer (Larson)
staffeng.com guides + Larson's engineering-strategy essays
Flip the ratio: reviews ≥ authored PRs within two quarters
Publish 4 public artifacts ({{blog post, OSS component, talk, case study — your picks}})
Teach 'Agentic engineering at {{your company}}' — 4 internal sessions
Open-source one harness component ({{a genuinely reusable piece of your tooling}})
Write + socialize '{{your platform}}: the next three years' strategy doc
Mentor 2 engineers with written growth plans
Decision hygiene: classify next 10 decisions by reversibility; pre-mortem the next one-way door; reference-class check estimates
External citation + something significant shipped that you wrote zero lines of
FBO/omnibus accounts & deposit-insurance pass-through — the BaaS sub-ledger boundary (Synapse case study)
Bitemporal modeling — valid vs record time (Fowler) + effective-dated rule versioning
{{your jurisdiction's data-protection + sector rules}} (e.g. GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, PCI-DSS) — regulation → architecture constraints (primary sources)
Prove per-user attribution in {{your sub-ledger or derived-data store}} reconciles against {{its upstream source of truth}}
Design bitemporal corrections for {{your accrual or time-dependent calculation}} + effective-dated rule versioning
Design the crypto-shredding/PII-vault split for {{your store of record}} + agent memory (right-to-erasure)
Map DR/replication topology against {{your data-residency/localization requirements}}; document every cross-border data flow
'Regulatory architecture' doc: each rule mapped to an enforced technical control, reviewed by compliance
Consistency ladder — linearizable→eventual precisely, CAP/PACELC, named session guarantees
Quorum math & replica lag — R+W>N ≠ safety (version reconciliation), read-your-writes fixes (sticky routing, causal tokens)
Locks, leases, clocks — GC-pause lease expiry, fencing tokens, Redlock critique; Date.now() ordering, HLC/TrueTime (self-test: audit area I)
Consensus & when you need it — Raft majority math, split-brain, the existing-chokepoint question; NewSQL latency floor, HTAP isolation cost
Cross-service atomicity — 2PC in-doubt blocking vs sagas (pivot, compensation); idempotency keys + where exactly-once ends; broker axes (ordering/fan-out/replay/throughput)
Postgres engine room I — planner statistics & cardinality estimation, cost constants; index design (composite order, covering + visibility map, GIN/BRIN/partial) (self-test: audit area D)
Postgres engine room II — autovacuum/bloat/xmin/XID wraparound; lock-queue DDL outages (CONCURRENTLY, NOT VALID); connection model + pooling modes (self-test: audit area D)
Picking the store — aggregate = atomicity boundary (the SQL-vs-NoSQL decider); DynamoDB partition physics; JSONB middle path + migration asymmetry
Vector index internals — HNSW vs IVFFlat (both in pgvector), IVF-PQ quantization (FAISS/Milvus family), the RAM ceiling of {{your retrieval stack}}
Scaling mechanics — cache stale-set race + stampede (leases/XFetch); sharding + consistent-hashing math; hot-key skew (hashing distributes keys, not traffic) (self-test: audit area I)
Failure physics I — metastable states, auto-remediation as amplifier; retry amplification R^N, retry budgets, deadline propagation; breaker vs admission control vs backpressure
Failure physics II — gray failure & differential observability; correlated failure, static stability, cells, shuffle sharding
Napkin-math gate: attach a 90-second capacity estimate (rows×size, QPS, $/mo) to every agent design proposal for two weeks
Five-veto drill: 5 real agent proposals (cache, lock, retry, index, 'use Dynamo') — write interrogation questions + verdict
EXPLAIN ANALYZE audit: find one correlated-predicate misestimate in production; fix via CREATE STATISTICS or index redesign
Publish 'How I interrogate AI-proposed designs' — the checklist + 3 real veto stories
